aoa-adr-write.notes: Writes bounded decision artifacts into canonical repository surfaces.

aoa-approval-gate-check.notes: Explicit-only because it classifies authority boundaries before risky work.

aoa-bounded-context-map.notes: Analytical boundary-mapping skill with no direct runtime mutation.

aoa-change-protocol.notes: General bounded change workflow for non-trivial code, config, and docs work.

aoa-contract-test.notes: Writes boundary checks or tests without requiring elevated runtime authority.

aoa-core-logic-boundary.notes: Refactoring guidance for separating reusable logic from glue code.

aoa-dry-run-first.notes: Preview-first workflow that should remain explicit because it fronts mutating operations.

aoa-invariant-coverage-audit.notes: Audit-only skill for checking whether invariants are truly covered.

aoa-local-stack-bringup.notes: Explicit-only because local stack launch can create side effects beyond simple file edits.

aoa-port-adapter-refactor.notes: Architecture refactor skill for isolating concrete dependencies.

aoa-property-invariants.notes: Adds invariant-oriented tests or checks to a codebase.

aoa-quest-harvest.notes: Leaf promotion-triage skill for one repeated reviewed quest unit after the wider session-harvest family has already done donor extraction or related post-session shaping.

aoa-session-donor-harvest.notes: Explicit-only nucleus skill for turning a reviewed session into a bounded HARVEST_PACKET, routing reusable outputs to the right owner layer, and handing off to later post-session family seams when needed.

aoa-automation-opportunity-scan.notes: Explicit-only detector skill for classifying whether reviewed recurring work is honestly automation-ready without granting schedule, hidden runtime, or self-mutation authority.

aoa-session-route-forks.notes: Explicit-only post-session branch-analysis skill for making next-route options legible without turning fork cards into hidden routing policy.

aoa-session-self-diagnose.notes: Explicit-only reviewed-session diagnosis skill for classifying drift, proof debt, and ownership confusion before any repair is attempted.

aoa-session-self-repair.notes: Explicit-only checkpoint-governed repair-packet skill that stays smaller than a rollout and does not allow silent self-mutation.

aoa-session-progression-lift.notes: Explicit-only evidence-backed progression overlay skill for reviewed sessions that keeps growth legible without creating sovereign scores or hidden routing authority.

aoa-safe-infra-change.notes: Infrastructure and configuration changes remain explicit-only with rollback discipline.

aoa-sanitized-share.notes: Explicit-only because it handles potentially sensitive raw technical material.

aoa-source-of-truth-check.notes: Maps authoritative documentation surfaces and entrypoints.

aoa-tdd-slice.notes: Bounded test-first change workflow with explicit refactor limits.

atm10-change-protocol.notes: Project overlay for atm10 repositories only.

atm10-source-of-truth-check.notes: Project overlay for atm10 repository document authority.

abyss-safe-infra-change.notes: Project overlay for abyss repository operational changes with explicit local authority.

abyss-sanitized-share.notes: Project overlay for abyss repository sharing and sanitization surfaces.
